definitions.text:
@làm lễ
- Tổ chức lễ: Làm lễ khánh thành trường học.
to take up, start an action

[làm lấy] to do something oneself/on one's own

 If you want something well done, (you should) do it yourself

[làm lại từ đầu] to start again from the beginning/from scratch

 One single mistake means starting all again from the beginning
[làm lệch] divert
[làm lại cuộc đời] to make a new/fresh start (in life); to start life afresh; to make a new life for oneself
